title: Customers
noCustomers: No customers yet. Add one above to get started.

fields.name: Name
fields.showCountryOnInvoiceHint: When on, the country line of this customer's address renders under the Invoice For block. Off by default — most domestic invoices read cleaner without it.

bulkSelectHint: Select rows to archive in bulk
liveResults: {count, plural, one {# customer shown} other {# customers shown}}
liveSelected: {count, plural, one {# customer selected} other {# customers selected}}
bulkArchivedToast: {count, plural, one {1 customer archived} other {# customers archived}}
bulkRestoredToast: {count, plural, one {1 customer restored} other {# customers restored}}

projects.title: Projects
projects.noProjects: No projects yet for this customer.

proposalsSection.title: Proposals
proposalsSection.none: No proposals yet for this customer.

invoicesSection.title: Invoices
invoicesSection.none: No invoices yet for this customer.

sharedWith: {count, plural, one {Shared with # organization} other {Shared with # organizations}}
bouncedBanner: {count, plural, one {# customer has bounced or marked an invoice as spam} other {# customers have bounced or marked an invoice as spam}}. Update their email before sending again.
bouncedRowTooltip: Resend reported a hard bounce on {when}. Update the customer's email before sending again.
complainedRowTooltip: Recipient marked the invoice email as spam on {when}.

branding.heading: Branding
branding.help: Optional co-brand shown on proposals prepared for this customer (PDF + sign page).

emptyDescription: Add your first customer to start tracking work and sending invoices.
archivedEmptyDescription: Archiving hides a customer everywhere — lists, pickers, reports. Use the trash icon on the customer list to archive one; anyone archived shows up here with a Restore button. For a dormant client you still want visible, use Mark inactive instead.
bulkDeactivatedToast: {count, plural, =1 {1 customer} other {# customers}} marked inactive.
lifecycleHint: Inactive customers keep all history visible but are grouped separately when starting new work. To hide a customer entirely, use Archive.
